OFFER LETTER 
Date: 13th March 2026 
To, 
Ms. Shweta 
Subject: Offer for Part-Time AI Consultant (Assignment Based) 
Dear Ms. Shweta, 
We are pleased to offer you an engagement as a Part-Time AI Consultant on an assignment basis with Indoglobal Deftech LLP,

you an engagement as a Part-Time AI Consultant on an assignment basis with Indoglobal Deftech LLP, 
as per our discussion. 
Your consultancy engagement will be governed by the following terms: 
1. Duration: The initial consultancy period will be three (3) months, commencing from 16 March 2026 and ending on 15 
June 2026, unless extended by mutual agreement. 
2. Work Schedule: You will work on an average of 4 hours per day, 5 days a week, on a Work from Home (WFH) basis. 
However, you will be re

average of 4 hours per day, 5 days a week, on a Work from Home (WFH) basis. 
However, you will be required to attend a minimum of three (3) meetings per week at the company office or any 
designated location, as scheduled. 
3. Consultancy Fee: You will be paid a fixed consultancy fee of INR 40,000 (Rupees Forty Thousand only) per month for 
the duration of this assignment. 
4. Nature of Engagement: This is an assignment-based consultancy engagement and does not constitute full-time 
employment w

: This is an assignment-based consultancy engagement and does not constitute full-time 
employment with the company. 
5. Confidentiality: You shall maintain strict confidentiality regarding all company information, data, and project-related 
matters during and after the course of this engagement. 
6. Termination: Either party may terminate this engagement by providing 15 days’ prior written notice. 
Kindly sign and return a copy of this letter as a token of your acceptance of the above terms and

Acceptance
